'''hawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:karyotypically|karyotypically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:karyotypically|karyotypically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:hawate|hawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hawatesher|hawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hawatesherĂ«m|hawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hawatero|hawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hawateshĂ«|hawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hawateshĂ«m|hawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihawatero|gokihawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihawateshĂ«|gokihawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihawateshĂ«m|gokihawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohawankerom|gohawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohawankeshĂ«|gohawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohawankeshĂ«m|gohawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohawankeya|gohawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hawaterom|hawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hawatemu|hawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hawateya|hawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihawaterom|gokihawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihawatemu|gokihawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihawateya|gokihawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:hawawate|hawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hawawatesher|hawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hawawatesherĂ«m|hawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hawawatero|hawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hawawateshĂ«|hawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hawawateshĂ«m|hawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihawawatero|gokihawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihawawateshĂ«|gokihawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihawawateshĂ«m|gokihawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohawawankerom|gohawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohawawankeshĂ«|gohawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohawawankeshĂ«m|gohawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohawawankeya|gohawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hawawaterom|hawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hawawatemu|hawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hawawateya|hawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihawawaterom|gokihawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihawawatemu|gokihawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihawawateya|gokihawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠwĂŠte|hĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠwĂŠtesher|hĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠwĂŠtero|hĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠwĂŠtero|gokihĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohĂŠwĂŠnkerom|gohĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohĂŠwĂŠnkeya|gohĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠwĂŠterom|hĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠwĂŠtemu|hĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠwĂŠteya|hĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠwĂŠterom|gokihĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokihĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠwĂŠteya|gokihĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafwafte|hafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafwaftesher|hafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafwaftesherĂ«m|hafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafwaftero|hafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafwafteshĂ«|hafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafwafteshĂ«m|hafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafwaftero|gokihafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafwafteshĂ«|gokihafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafwafteshĂ«m|gokihafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafwafnkerom|gohafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafwafnkeshĂ«|gohafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafwafnkeshĂ«m|gohafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafwafnkeya|gohafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafwafterom|hafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafwaftemu|hafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafwafteya|hafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafwafterom|gokihafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafwaftemu|gokihafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafwafteya|gokihafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
